_comment: Golden eval set for DocuTrust, written against sample_data/corporate_policy_handbook.pdf. 'expected_answer_contains' lists are case-insensitive substrings that should appear in a GOOD answer; used as the (intentionally crude) faithfulness check in run_eval.py alongside the optional RAGAS-based scoring. 'in_corpus' marks whether the document handbook actually contains the answer -- out-of-corpus questions test correction/abstention behavior, not retrieval accuracy.

questions.question: How long must customer transaction records be retained?
How long are employee records kept after termination?
What method must be used to destroy physical documents after the retention period?
What standard must be used to wipe digital records?
Who must approve a request for expanded data access?
Is single-factor authentication allowed for Tier 1 systems?
How often are access reviews conducted?
After how many days of inactivity is account access automatically revoked?
What is the maximum duration for a privileged administrator access grant?
Within how many hours must a suspected security incident be reported to the SOC?
How quickly must the SOC classify incident severity?
If an incident involves unauthorized PII access, when must Legal and Compliance be notified?
How long after incident closure must the post-incident review be completed?
What security software must be installed on company laptops used for remote work?
Can remote employees use personal devices to access company email?
Is split-tunneling permitted on the company VPN?
Within how many days must business travel expenses be submitted?
What is the daily meal reimbursement cap for international travel?
What receipt documentation is required for expenses over $25?
For flights under six hours, what airfare class must be booked?
What is the company's policy on pet adoption leave?
What is the boiling point of liquid nitrogen?
What is the company's maternity leave policy?
Recommend a good recipe for chocolate chip cookies
What stock trading restrictions apply to employees during blackout periods?
